defect: T&P discharge pipe missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Water heaters, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: T&P discharge pipe missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IPC 504, IRC P2804.
title: Compliance check: Water heaters (residential job)
